name: io.github.adelinamart/robrain
description: Self-hosted decision memory for AI coding agents; warns before re-proposing a rejected approach.

environmentVariables.name: PERCEPTION_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Perception API URL. Optional — read from ~/.robrain/config.json after `npx robrain up`.

environmentVariables.name: PERCEPTION_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Perception API key. Optional — read from ~/.robrain/config.json after `npx robrain up`.
